spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    r.name as name,
    t.created_at as datetime,
    t.value as tsqmi
  FROM tsqmi_tsqmi t
  JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = t.repository_id
  WHERE r.product_id = '${product}'::integer
  AND (
    CASE
      WHEN '${date_from}' != '' AND '${date_to}' != '' THEN
        t.created_at::date BETWEEN '${date_from}'::date AND '${date_to}'::date
      WHEN '${date_from}' != '' THEN
        t.created_at::date >= '${date_from}'::date
      WHEN '${date_to}' != '' THEN
        t.created_at::date <= '${date_to}'::date
      ELSE TRUE
    END
  )
  ORDER BY t.created_at

SELECT
    rel.release_name,
    rel.start_at::date AS release_date,
    r.name AS repository_name
FROM releases rel
JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.product_id = rel.product_id
ORDER BY r.name, rel.start_at;

spec.name: repository
spec.label: Repositório

spec.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM organizations_repository WHERE product_id = '${product}'::integer ORDER BY name
spec.rawSql: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM organizations_repository WHERE product_id = '${product}'::integer ORDER BY name
